hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r filepath; if [[ "$filepath" == *.lua ]]; then project_root="/Users/rgarner/Documents/Code/Readium"; [[ "$filepath" == "$project_root"/* ]] && relpath="${filepath#$project_root/}" && [[ "$relpath" != */* ]] && cd "$project_root" && python3 tools/map_extract.py "$relpath" map/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
